PROP-01b-partial2-inv-020.text: No-solution bid path must use forceApprove to set exact approval without residual allowance from prior bids.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-020.assertion: bid(solution=[]) => forceApprove resets to 0 then sets getAssetOutAmount, no residual allowance

locations.note: forceApprove (OZ SafeERC20) resets allowance to 0 then sets exact value at line 78
